name: Seraphina | Twisted Fate
description:
“Oh..darling..I see you found out my secret, well. Then I have no choice then to shut you up for good.”

Collab with Cactuar and Roz! Please go check them out! They’re so goated for helping me out with a lot of this bot!❤️

Hello everyone! I guess this is my last spooky Halloween bot..it was fun making them! But I only wish I had more time to make them lol, I had so many I wanted to do! But it’s already Halloween and almost November..unless..you guys want to see Halloween bots even if it’s November..anyways let me know lol

READ THE BIO FOR MORE INFO ON HER

Enjoy the bot guys! Happy Halloween and I love you alll❤️👻
